_captured_from: v0.4.1 measurement run on production-aligned SHAPES; internal/log/test_sageattn_ltx_shapes_2026-04-27.log
_doc: Pinned (shape, mode) baselines for the load-bearing rows in tests/test_sageattn_ltx_shapes.py. Run the bench with --check-regression to gate on these. Update via a deliberate kernel/env change. Drift threshold per CLAUDE.md / Bench env discipline. Speedup ratio floor per CLAUDE.md / Performance research / What we explicitly ignore (torch_eff/torch_cudnn rows). v0.4.1 realignment: shapes sourced from real consumer trace sage_2026-04-26_105851.jsonl, mapped to LTX 2.3 default config (transformer_ltx2.py:907-947) -- video d=128, audio d=64.

baselines.rationale: primary metric -- LTX 2.3 video self-attn at production seq (init render), corrected head_dim=128. CLAUDE.md / Performance research / load-bearing
speedup-ratio normalizer; torch_flash/sage_fp8++ = 2.66x at production shape; floor 1.5x
loop-iter variant; most common iter>=1 path in production traces
K-probe denominator at corrected video config; K = 1.16/0.74 = 1.57 at kv=226 (< 5x trigger; native CUDA mask kernel work stays deferred)
K-probe numerator + the mask-correct kernel itself; rtol must stay near 0.04 across kv range

v0.3.0 dispatcher mask-routing correctness witness: auto must dispatch masked calls to fp16_triton (matching the row above), NOT to fp8_cuda++ (which would show ~0.44 rtol from the silent-mask-drop bug)
